creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #13)
It builds fine with my patch.

Relevant log from Poudriere build after the patch:

checking for python version...
checking for python platform...
checking for GNU default python prefix... ${prefix}
checking for GNU default python exec_prefix... ${exec_prefix}
checking for python script directory (pythondir)... ${PYTHON_PREFIX}/lib/python/site-packages
checking for python extension module directory (pyexecdir)... ${PYTHON_EXEC_PREFIX}/lib/python/site-packages
